name: Asus PA278CV (IPS Panel, Res: 2560X1440, 75Hz, 5ms GTG, USB Type-C ) 2K
highlights: ASUS ProArt Display PA278CV is a 27-inch WQHD professional monitor designed for creative professionals, featuring a 100% sRGB color gamut, factory-calibrated color accuracy (ΔE < 2), and an IPS panel with a 75Hz refresh rate

With USB-C (65W PD), DisplayPort daisy-chaining, and versatile ergonomic adjustments, the PA278CV ensures precise color performance, excellent connectivity, and superior comfort for designers, editors, and photographers
